sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43118" key="e(terh/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερ-ήρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">Ἄρω</etym>) <sense id="n43118.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀμφήρης</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:165" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">165</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
